llm_operation.reason: tf.linspace uses 'start', 'stop', 'num', 'axis'; paddle.logspace uses 'start', 'stop', 'num', 'base', 'dtype'. Both reject 'end' and 'steps'. Must rename 'end'→'stop', 'steps'→'num', remove 'base' for tf.linspace.
tf.linspace生成线性等距序列，paddle.logspace生成对数等距序列，二者数学定义不同，功能不等价，无法直接比较
